ownership_contract.task_goal: PR Ready docs/light-metadata implementation for Lode FR #230 bb-sites Xiaohongshu/BOSS site-knowledge absorption freeze.
ownership_contract.read_scope: Lode repository, GitHub issue metadata, read-only research/source locators outside Lode, and current XHS/BOSS package assets.
ownership_contract.write_ownership: Lode absorption freeze contract docs, README/docs indexes, and LODE-231 Loom carriers only.
non_goals: No live Xiaohongshu or BOSS login automation
No merge or issue closeout by this execution subagent
ownership_contract.output_format: Implementation PR with metadata covering #230 #231 #232 #233 #234 and final subagent report to the main controller.

ownership_constraints: Write ownership is limited to docs/light-metadata truth carriers and LODE-231 Loom carriers.
Forbidden writes include App, Harbor, WebEnvoy/Core, research, sources, sites package semantics, registry files, tools, runtime artifacts, merge, and issue closeout actions.
integration_evidence: Added bb-sites Xiaohongshu/BOSS absorption freeze contract.
Linked the contract from README and docs contract index.
Local package validator batch, diff check, Loom fact-chain, Loom verify, and suite checks are the PR Ready validation inputs.

suite_path_consumption.not_applicable_rationale: This PR adds repo-local Lode docs/light-metadata carriers only; it does not add package schema changes, runtime code, cross-repo API ownership, live evidence storage, or executable browser automation.
suite_path_consumption.consumer_boundary: Review and PR readiness may consume source absorption, field mapping, license/copy boundary, first-batch capability boundary, and user confirmation requirements.
suite_path_consumption.recheck_condition: Upgrade to full suite when a later PR changes package schemas, registry, validator/tooling, live runtime execution, Core result envelopes, Harbor evidence schemas, true write behavior, hosted registry behavior, or cross-repo contract ownership.
